arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers shares why he is certain Luke McCowan will achieve greater career heights at Celtic
arts.sum: Speaking ahead of Celtic’s trip to face Aberdeen at Pittodrie, Rodgers pointed out that McCowan is always on the hunt to learn and applauded his ability to fit his tactical ideals by virtue of his hard work. Rodgers thinks Luke McCowan could earn Scotland call

arts.ttl: Aberdeen's recent record at Pittodrie Celtic fans might not have known about
arts.sum: Not only are Celtic four points ahead of Aberdeen at the top of the Scottish Premiership table but Brendan Rodgers also has a game in hand. Celtic face a trip to Pittodrie to face Aberdeen in what could be a season-defining game in the Scottish Premiership this week.

arts.ttl: Can Aberdeen prolong race or will Celtic show class?
arts.sum: Aberdeen host leaders and reigning champions Celtic on Wednesday, but will there still be a title race by the final whistle?

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers responds to Luis Palma Celtic exit rumours with clear answer
arts.sum: Luis Palma has become a peripheral figure at Celtic this season under Brendan Rodgers despite putting up some promising numbers in his first year at Parkhead. Earlier this week, reports emerged that Celtic’s Luis Palma is attracting interest from MLS clubs after finding it difficult to convince Rodgers that he is worthy of a regular first-team berth.

arts.ttl: Dundee derby & Celtic v Kilmarnock in Scottish Cup
arts.sum: Celtic host Kilmarnock, Rangers meet Fraserburgh and there will be a Dundee derby at Dens Park after the draw for the fourth round of the Scottish Cup.

arts.ttl: Philippe Clement uses Celtic star to make Rangers example in point which will irate Ibrox punters
arts.sum: But following what must be acknowledged as an impressive 4-1 Europa League win over Nice in France last week – and then another narrow domestic victory over St Johnstone – Clement explained how his players still need to be given the time to gel together. Clement piled praise on Nicolas Kuhn for improving for Celtic this season

arts.ttl: Celtic told Brendan Rodgers 'won't answer' question about Luke McCowan ahead of Aberdeen clash
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers ‘won’t answer’ question on if Luke McCowan starts for Celtic at Aberdeen Celtic outclassed Ross County at the weekend, with the manager making several changes, including bringing in the very popular, Luke McCowan – his third start in the Premiership.

arts.ttl: Thelin not stressed by Aberdeen form | Rodgers: Celtic face 'tough' Pittodrie test
arts.sum: Jimmy Thelin insists he isn't getting "stressed" by Aberdeen's form ahead of their clash with Celtic, while Brendan Rodgers is expecting a "tough" test at the home of their nearest title rivals.

arts.ttl: Scottish rock band Mogwai allude to Celtic 10-in-a-row documentary discussions
arts.sum: Winning 10-in-a-row is the ultimate goal for both sides of the Glasgow divide.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan gets Celtic big licks as Brendan Rodgers lists 4 key traits that show he is future Scotland star
arts.sum: The midfielder grabbed his big chance from the start against Ross County with both hands by delivering a man of the match display
